use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and pages
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and navigation
Secondary action buttons alongside primary CTAs
Accessible link-style buttons for inline navigation
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Uses class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and includes focus-visible and disabled states for accessibility compliance. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for any React application.
